## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-07-15 — do not edit manually*

### Sympy SWE Bench Verification
*~5,309 tokens/session saved*
- In `sympy__sympy-11400`, avoid repeated Python interpreter probing after `mpmath`/`distutils` import failures; use `uv run --python 3.11 ...` only for quick version checks, and prefer static/targeted file checks when old Sympy cannot import cleanly.
- Do not retry `python`, `python3`, pyenv shims, or pip installs after `ModuleNotFoundError: mpmath`; this environment repeatedly fails old Sympy imports.

### Sympy Printing Files
*~1,136 tokens/session saved*
- For `sympy/printing/ccode.py`, read the full file once or use symbol searches for `_print_Piecewise`, `known_functions`, and `class CCodePrinter`; do not re-read overlapping slices.
- For `sympy/printing/tests/test_ccode.py`, search once for the target test/function and then read the exact surrounding range; avoid repeated whole-file or nearby-slice reads.

### Forge Harness Web Access
*~1,000 tokens/session saved*
- In Forge harness sessions, use only `mcp__forge__web_search` and `mcp__forge__web_fetch` for web access; do not use provider-native or built-in browser/search tools.

### Search Scope
*~148 tokens/session saved*
- When locating tests in `sympy/printing/tests/test_ccode.py`, run one combined `grep -n "^def test_\|sinc\|Piecewise"` or equivalent `rg` query instead of repeating separate `grep -n "^def test_"` calls.

<!-- headroom:learn:end -->
